## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff strategy sprint for Prophecy's pivot to target data analysts and analytics leaders, aligning on personas and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prophecy is pivoting from data engineers to data analysts and analytics leaders as primary personas](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Focus on creating content for mid to large enterprises using Databricks, addressing access and governance challenges](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Aim to show early results in \~47 days to make case for extending GrowthX contract](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Balancing Raj's (CEO) content preferences with SEO/AEO opportunities will be key](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=2986.0)

## Topics

### Prophecy's Pivot and New Target Personas

  - [Shifting focus from data engineers to data analysts and analytics leaders](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Three key personas: end-user analysts, analytics leaders (buyers), and data platform teams (gatekeepers)](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Targeting mid to large enterprises, especially those using Databricks](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Main value prop: Enabling analysts to access and work with data in Databricks while maintaining governance](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Focusing on both ends of the intent spectrum: informational "what is/how to" content and high-intent comparisons/alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Aiming to build topical authority for new audience while also targeting high-conversion keywords](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Balancing CEO's content preferences with SEO/AEO opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=2986.0)
  - [Leveraging GrowthX's agentic workflows for high-quality, persona-aligned content](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=3541.0)

### Website and Branding Updates

  - [Transitioning from prophecy.io to prophecy.ai](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [New homepage design to clearly communicate Prophecy's value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Considering creation of a unified "Get Started" page to streamline user journeys](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)

### Competitive Landscape and Keyword Opportunities

  - [Identified 14,000+ relevant keywords from analyzing just two competitors](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=2527.0)
  - [670 high-potential, low-difficulty keyword opportunities identified](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=2701.0)
  - [Focus on topics like "AI tools for data visualization" and "Tableau alternatives" for quick wins](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=2857.0)

### GrowthX Engagement Goals

  - [Demonstrate value of new approach within \~47 days to secure contract extension](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Leverage agentic workflows and eval loops to ensure high-quality, persona-aligned content](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=3541.0)
  - [Balance quick wins (e.g. listicles, comparisons) with more in-depth, technical content](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=2986.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Wilton to review persona descriptions with Raj and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=2008.0)
  - [GrowthX to create and share content clusters for review by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=2008.0)
  - [Team to identify overlap between Raj's content preferences and high-potential SEO/AEO opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=2986.0)
  - [Begin content creation, prioritizing quick wins and persona-aligned topics](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=2701.0)
  - [Consider scheduling call with Galileo AI co-founder as reference in 3-4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/dQ8vyg_r3f3MBsNfDeggsatvjnvyyF5G?tab=summary&timestamp=3226.0)
